response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience in distributed systems, AI-driven development, and technical strategy, with a strong background in software development and a history of working with diverse technologies and teams.
strengths: Experienced in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
Proven track record in technical leadership and strategy
Strong expertise in multiple programming languages and technologies
concerns: Limited direct experience in high-throughput, distributed systems with strong reliability requirements
No explicit mention of experience with on-call rotations or operational readiness
Basic German language skills may be a limitation in a Berlin-based team
